Summary: RG-2D Wallet and spend safety hardening
Epic Name: RG-2D Wallet and spend safety hardening
Description: Complete transactional safety and operational robustness for wallet debit + gift send.
Complete funnel telemetry, abuse signals, and operational dashboards.
Implement streak and session rewards with anti-idle and cap enforcement.
Runtime-configurable limited drops and offer experimentation.

Summary: Harden gift send consistency and retry semantics
Description: Strengthen debit/send consistency under retries and downstream failure paths.
Acceptance Criteria: Idempotent retries are replay-safe; insufficient balance path remains deterministic; downstream failure scenarios have compensating behavior; integration tests cover duplicate submit and transient failures

Summary: Operationalize wallet audit visibility and controls
Description: Ensure wallet mutation history is queryable and operationally reviewable.
Acceptance Criteria: Wallet credit/debit/top-up events are audit-logged; admin-facing retrieval path exists; audit payload includes actor, reason, amount, resulting balance

Summary: Implement complete gift funnel event taxonomy
Description: Capture all key funnel interactions and economy outcomes for tuning.
Acceptance Criteria: Events include panel open, preview open, send success, send fail (insufficient/other), coins spent; required properties documented; staging validation evidence attached

Summary: Publish rose gifts KPI dashboard spec and ownership
Description: Define dashboard panels and owner responsibilities for north-star and guardrails.
Acceptance Criteria: Dashboard includes D7 uplift cohort, confirm-sheet completion, free-share ratio, spend distribution; owner and refresh SLA recorded

Summary: Daily login streak coin reward API and rules
Description: Grant streak coins on first eligible daily action with reset behavior.
Acceptance Criteria: First eligible daily action grants configured streak reward; missed day resets streak; daily cap is enforced; tests cover timezone boundary and duplicate claims

Summary: Active session reward loop with anti-idle checks
Description: Reward active usage only with cooldown and cap.
Acceptance Criteria: Rewards require interaction signal set; idle/background sessions do not accrue; cooldown and per-day cap are enforced; abuse-like patterns are flagged

Summary: Abuse and fraud velocity controls for economy
Description: Detect suspicious earn/send velocity and apply policy response.
Acceptance Criteria: Rule checks identify anomalous velocity; alert events emitted; response actions (warn/throttle/temp lock) are feature-flagged

Summary: Weekly limited drop scheduler and activation controls
Description: Enable weekly rotating limited gift without app release.
Acceptance Criteria: One active limited drop can be scheduled and auto-expired; expired items hidden/disabled in catalog API; configuration is runtime-managed

Summary: OpenAPI and contract snapshot sync for rose hardening
Description: Align API contract updates with implementation changes and snapshots.
Acceptance Criteria: OpenAPI updated in source; make proto run completed when required; contract snapshot updated in docs/contracts

Summary: Release-flag rollout and rollback plan for rose economy
Description: Define staged rollout with kill switches and rollback criteria.
Acceptance Criteria: Flags listed with owners; rollout stages documented; rollback trigger thresholds and runbook approved
